description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a solved support thread about lag spikes in that game from the last 7 days with the highest upvotes, then bookmark and follow it.

target_names: Galaxy Clash lag spikes every few seconds (PC)

tasks.instruction: Create a new high‑severity PC bug report thread in that game's technical issues area about error code 1001, tagged for bugs and PC, including when the error appears and at least three steps to reproduce, then publish it.

target_names: Galaxy Clash error code 1001 on PC

tasks.instruction: Locate an unanswered support thread from the last 3 days for that game on PS5 about voice chat not working, post a reply with at least two troubleshooting steps, and start following the thread.

target_names: Battle Royale X PS5 - voice chat not working in squads

tasks.instruction: Change your notification settings so that only mentions and replies to your threads trigger on‑site alerts, all email notifications are disabled, and the activity digest is sent weekly.

tasks.instruction: In the clan and group recruitment forum, find a reply that contains clear harassment or abusive language, and submit a report on that reply using the harassment/abuse reason with an explanation of at least 20 characters.

target_names: Why would we invite you? Your stats are trash and nobody wants a useless player dragging the team down.

tasks.instruction: In the Help Center, search for password reset articles in the account and login category, sort results by highest rating, then save and mark as helpful the first article in the sorted list.

target_names: How to reset your forum password

tasks.instruction: Open one of your existing support topics about being unable to join a friend's lobby in that game, move it into the dedicated connection issues subforum, then mark the highest‑upvoted reply in that thread as the accepted solution.

target_names: A few things to check for Battle Royale X lobby issues:

tasks.instruction: Join that game's community hub, follow it, then open its pinned rules thread to like the original post and add a short reply confirming that you agree to the rules.

tasks.instruction: In the server status forum, filter for EU‑tagged server status threads from the last 24 hours, sort by newest, and follow the two most recent threads.
